description: General-purpose multi-lens review swarm. Launches independent reviewers by lens, then verifies, merges, judges, and normalizes the result.

defaults.merge_policy: Preserve partial reviewer reports, branch status, and degraded confidence markers. If reviewer evidence is below threshold, do not invent consensus.
defaults.claim: The reviewed scope has clear, evidence-based findings, risks, and recommended next actions.
defaults.evidence_policy: Cite inspected files, command outputs, or explicit uncertainty for every material claim.
defaults.risk_policy: Preserve minority high-impact risks and ideas; separate confirmed issues from hypotheses.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Status (complete/degraded/insufficient_data), Summary, Consensus Findings, Minority Findings, Verification, Judge Notes, Risks, Next Actions.
